content_en: BOOK OF AL-`UMDAH 15 International University in Latin America In the name of Allah, most Beneficent, most Merciful. All types of thanks and praise are due to Allah, the most worthy of thanks and praise, a praise superior to all other types of praise, like the superiority of Allah over all of His creation. I bear witness that nothing deserves to be worshipped / adored except for Allah, He's one without partners, the witness of someone who recognizes and establishes His right. I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and messenger, without being doubtful about his truthfulness. May Allah bestow blessings on him, his family, and his companions - as long as the clouds bring about rain and the thunder comes after the lightning. 16 International University in Latin America To proceed: This is a book on Jurisprudence. I summarized it as much as possible. I limited myself in it to one opinion, in order that it becomes a reliable source of information, and so that the right opinion isn't confused because of differences in the opinions narrated by the scholars after Imam Ahmad and those narrated from him directly. Some of my brothers had asked me to summarize it to make it more accessible to those seeking knowledge, and to make it easy to memorize for the seekers/students of knowledge. So I answered this request, relying on Allah to make my intention sincere and for His Face, and help me upon reaching His great pleasure. He is sufficient for us and the best disposer of affairs. 17 International University in Latin America I included in it authentic narrations for their blessings, and authority. I chose them from the authentic collections in order to not need to reference them. 18 International University in Latin America < < <
content_id:
Beliau adalah Muwaffaquddin Abu Muhammad Abdullah bin Ahmad bin Muhammad bin Qudamah al-Maqdisi al-Hanbali. Lahir di Desa Jamaail, wilayah Nablus, Palestina, tahun 541 H. Keluarganya berhijrah ke Damaskus ketika beliau masih kecil, dan di sanalah beliau tumbuh dan menuntut ilmu dari ulama-ulama besar.

Ibn Qudamah menuntut ilmu fikih Hanbali di Baghdad, berguru kepada Syekh Abdul Qadir al-Jilani. Beliau menguasai fikih, ushul fikih, hadis, dan berbagai ilmu Islam lainnya. Di antara karya-karya terbesarnya: Al-Mughni (ensiklopedi fikih semua mazhab), Al-Muqni (teks tingkat menengah), Al-Kafi (ringkasan dengan dalil), Al-Umdah (primer untuk pemula), dan Rawdhat al-Nadhir (ushul fikih). Imam Ibn Taimiyyah berkata: "Tidak ada seorang pun yang masuk ke Syam setelah al-Awzai yang lebih berilmu dari al-Muwaffaq (Ibn Qudamah)." Beliau wafat di Damaskus tahun 620 H, semoga Allah merahmati beliau.

All types of thanks and praise are due to الله, the most worthy of thanks and praise, a praise superior to all other types of praise, like the superiority of الله over all of His creation. I bear witness that nothing deserves to be worshipped / adored except for الله, He's one without partners, the witness of someone who recognizes and establishes His right. I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and messenger, without being doubtful about his truthfulness. May الله bestow blessings on him, his family, and his الصحابة - as long as the clouds bring about rain and the thunder comes after the lightning. 16 International University in Latin America To proceed: This is a book on Jurisprudence. I summarized it as much as possible. I limited myself in it to one opinion, in order that it becomes a reliable source of information, and so that the right opinion isn't confused because of differences in the opinions narrated by the scholars after Imam Ahmad and those narrated from him directly. Some of my brothers had asked me to summarize it to make it more accessible to those seeking knowledge, and to make it easy to memorize for the seekers/students of knowledge. So I answered this request, relying on الله to make my intention sincere and for His Face, and help me upon reaching His great pleasure. He is sufficient for us and the best disposer of affairs. 17 International University in Latin America I included in it authentic narrations for their blessings, and authority. I chose them from the authentic collections in order to not need to reference them. 18 International University in Latin America < < <
